items.title: Naz Reid Fined $50K For Questioning Integrity Of Officials
items.blurb: Naz Reid Fined $50K For Questioning Integrity Of Officials — The NBA fined Naz Reid $50,000 "for questioning the integrity of game officials" during the Minnesota Timberwolves' 110-108 win over the Houston Rockets on Wednesday. items.title: Anthony Edwards Cleared For On-Court Basketball Practice Activities
items.blurb: Anthony Edwards Cleared For On-Court Basketball Practice Activities — Anthony Edwards, who has missed the last five games with right knee patellofemoral pain syndrome, has been cleared for on-court basketball practice activities. items.title: Timberwolves stun Rockets with historic OT comeback
items.blurb: Timberwolves stun Rockets with historic OT comeback — Julius Randle hit the go-ahead jumper with 8.8 seconds left in overtime to cap a game-closing 15-0 run by the Minnesota Timberwolves for a 110-108 victory over the Houston Rockets on Wednesday night.

items.title: Adama Bal, Grizzlies Sign 10 Day Contract
items.blurb: Adama Bal, Grizzlies Sign 10 Day Contract — The Memphis Grizzlies have signed forward Adama Bal to a hardship 10 Day contract. Memphis ruled several players out for the season due to injuries. In addition, the Grizzlies have other players dealing with various non-season-ending injuries. items.title: Joel Embiid provides shockingly optimistic health update after monster return
items.blurb: Joel Embiid provides shockingly optimistic health update after monster return — Embiid returned to the lineup for the 76ers on Wednesday night after missing the last 13 games with an oblique injury.

items.title: Paul George's return shows silver lining to suspension
items.blurb: Paul George's return shows silver lining to suspension — The Philadelphia 76ers lost Paul George for 25 games due to a drug suspension. His strong return Wednesday night showed there may be some benefits to his forced eight-week absence.

items.title: Jalen Johnson: Another double-double
items.blurb: Jalen Johnson: Another double-double — Johnson posted 26 points (11-22 FG, 4-1 3Pt), 10 assists, five rebounds and one steal over 37 minutes during the Hawks' 123-113 win over the Kings on Saturday. Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.

items.title: Nickeil Alexander-Walker: Strong performance Saturday
items.blurb: Nickeil Alexander-Walker: Strong performance Saturday — Alexander-Walker logged 27 points (7-14 FG, 4-9 3Pt, 9-9 FT), eight assists, five rebounds and four steals over 36 minutes during the Hawks' 123-113 win over the Kings on Saturday. Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.

items.title: Double play: Former top pick Fultz returns to NBA in unique fashion with Raptors
items.blurb: Double play: Former top pick Fultz returns to NBA in unique fashion with Raptors — Markelle Fultz’s career has had many stops and starts because of injuries. The former No. 1 overall pick made his return to the NBA with the Raptors on a manic Monday, with the hope of better days ahead.

items.title: Why Raptors should be able to avoid East Play-In
items.blurb: Why Raptors should be able to avoid East Play-In — NBA TV and Offside Analyst, Mo Dakhil spoke on The Raptors Show about how tight the Eastern Conference has become but backs Toronto to stay out of the play-in tournament.

items.blurb: NBA Highlights: Hawks 123, Kings 113 — Nickeil Alexander-Walker led the way with 27 points and Jalen Johnson added 26 points and 10 assists as the Atlanta Hawks defeated the Sacramento Kings 123-113.

items.title: James Harden Notched Historic Career Feat On Monday
items.blurb: James Harden Notched Historic Career Feat On Monday —   Los Angeles Clippers guard James Harden entered Monday’s matchup against the Philadelphia 76ers needing just one point to reach a significant career milestone. The Clippers fell to Philadelphia in a closely contested game at the Wells Fargo Center on Tuesday, but Harden delivered 28 points along with six rebounds and five assists.

items.title: Doc Rivers Unsure If Kevin Porter Jr Will Play Again This Season
items.blurb: Doc Rivers Unsure If Kevin Porter Jr Will Play Again This Season — Milwaukee Bucks guard Kevin Porter Jr's season may be coming to an early end. items.blurb: NBA suspends Mitchell, Champagnie after Thunder-Wizards brawl — The NBA has handed down a pair of suspensions in the aftermath of the brawl during Sunday’s game between the Oklahoma City Thunder and Washington Wizards.
